check_name: Required staged primitive inputs are present
Quantity index is not aggregated or used as a raw capital sum
notes: K_quantity_index is carried as asset-level input context only.

check_name: Guardian pKN is finite and positive
notes: pKN is recovered under the GPIM stock-flow law.

check_name: Current-cost GPIM recursion residual is within tolerance
notes: First panel year is an anchor row and is excluded from recursion residual maxima.

check_name: Real GPIM recursion residual is within tolerance
notes: Depletion rate is read from the locked net-value vintage schedule implied by S29B.

check_name: Asset is validated before capacity aggregation
notes: ME and NRC checks are computed before bottom-up aggregation.
D05 constructs only ME, NRC, and capacity as ME plus NRC.

check_name: No forbidden baseline object is included
notes: Provider TOTAL, IPP, residential, government transportation, and official unmapped prices are excluded.
